hooks.command:
cfg="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.claude/team.toml"; legacy="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.claude/team.config"; if [ -f "$cfg" ]; then printf '=== mARC :: per-repo team.toml (channel topic) ===
'; cat "$cfg"; printf '
=== end team.toml ===
'; elif [ -f "$legacy" ]; then printf '[mARC] DEPRECATED: .claude/team.config found but mARC now reads .claude/team.toml only — re-run /marc:init (or convert by hand from docs/team.toml.example) to migrate; the old file is no longer parsed.
'; else printf '[mARC] no .claude/team.toml in this repo — @techlead will fall back to runtime discovery (gh repo view / gh project list). Add one from docs/team.toml.example to pin repo/project facts.
'; fi; exit 0
